title: Gaimon Guards the Island of Rare Animals
description: On pages 9–11, Luffy, Zoro, and Nami reach a strange island where Gaimon and the rare animals guard a lonely mystery.
scene: The crew’s lighthearted exploration turns into a small fable about treasure, isolation, and the life Gaimon built after being trapped on the island.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hey! Why don't you lift me up?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Wow! It's a man!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Lift me up!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What an interest- ing call- flower head! Call- leftover man!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Why are you so angry? You tripped yourself...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Gomu Gomu fruit...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's a "devil's fruit" right?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I have heard about that before...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But it is the first time I have met someone who actually ate that kind of fruit

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Island resident GAIMON

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's the first time I've met someone who's stuck in a treasure chest too

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You're like a son in a box*

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yeah... my parents took care of me when I was still small...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Are you an idiot!?

dialogue.speaker: Gaimon
dialogue.text: I got stuck in here and I can't get out!

dialogue.speaker: Gaimon
dialogue.text: I've lived on this island like this for 20 years already!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Can't you under- stand what I've been going through?!?

dialogue.speaker: Gaimon
dialogue.text: What? 20 years?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: lived on this island by your- self?

dialogue.speaker: Gaimon
dialogue.text: Yes..20 years...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That's really stupid...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What did you say? I'm gonna kill you!

dialogue.speaker: Gaimon
dialogue.text: 20 years... what a long time!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: My hair and mustache have already grown this long,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: And even my eye- brows are connected...

dialogue.speaker: Gaimon
dialogue.text: I haven't talked to anybody for 20 years...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It hurts! It hurts! What the hell are you doing?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Why can't I pull you out?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Stop! Stop! My neck's gonna break!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You're crazy! I haven't moved in years

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: My body and this treasure chest have already become one!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: If you are going to forcefully pull me out, then my body will be done for!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But...

summary: This part works as a pause between major arcs, showing that the sea contains strange lives and unusual dreams beyond simple battles.
